_publications._publicationTitle: TGFβ Signaling Increases Net Acid Extrusion, Proliferation and Invasion in Panc-1 Pancreatic Cancer Cells: SMAD4 Dependence and Link to Merlin/NF2 Signaling.

_contextSnippet: the NBCn1 protein level in MIAPaCa-2 and Panc-1 cells, compared to that observed in HPDE cells
details: Successfully detected NBCn1 protein by western blotting, showing increased levels in MIAPaCa-2 and Panc-1 cells compared to HPDE cells
